zh.Crécy-en-Ponthieu, Somme, Hauts-de-Franc: 法國豪-德-福朗斯索姆可雷希--朋提額
zh.lifeSummary: 當Guy VIII de Mauvoisin於1270年出生在法國諾門迪艾吉索斯時，他的父親Guy VII de Mauvoisin, Seigneur de Mello40歲，母親Isabeau De Mello31歲。他於1303年與Laure de Ponthieu在法國豪-德-福朗斯索姆可雷希--朋提額結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他去世於1327年1月31日之後。

zh-hans.Crécy-en-Ponthieu, Somme, Hauts-de-Franc: 法国豪-德-福朗斯索姆可雷希--朋提額
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Guy VIII de Mauvoisin于1270年出生在法国諾門迪艾吉索斯时，他的父亲Guy VII de Mauvoisin, Seigneur de Mello40岁，母亲Isabeau De Mello31岁。他于1303年与Laure de Ponthieu在法国豪-德-福朗斯索姆可雷希--朋提額结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他去世于1327年1月31日之后。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Guy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, originally a short form of a compound name starting with witu ‘wood’ or wīt ‘wide’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England. In Old French initial w- regularly became gu-. The usual Norman forms of the name were Gy or Guido. In medieval Latin the same name is found as Wido. It was a popular name among the Normans, enhanced no doubt by the romance of Guy of Warwick, recounting the exploits of a folk hero of the Crusades.

nameMeanings.name: VIII
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Feminine pet form of   Vivien   and   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Guy VIII de Mauvoisin was born in 1270, in Gisors, Eure, Normandy, France, his father, Guy VII de Mauvoisin, Seigneur de Mello, was 40 and his mother, Isabeau De Mello, was 31. He married Laure de Ponthieu in 1303, in Crécy-en-Ponthieu, Somme, Hauts-de-France, France. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He died after 31 January 1327.

fr.Nantes, Loire-Atlantique, Pays de la Loi: Nantes, Loire-Atlantique, Pays de la Loire, France
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Guy VIII de Mauvoisin est né en 1270, à Gisors, Eure, Normandie, France, son père, Guy VII de Mauvoisin, Seigneur de Mello, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Isabeau De Mello, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Laure de Ponthieu en 1303, à Crécy-en-Ponthieu, Somme, Hauts-de-France, France. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il est décédé après 31 janvier 1327.

de.Nantes, Loire-Atlantique, Pays de la Loi: Nantes, Loire-Atlantique, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich
de.lifeSummary: Als Guy VIII de Mauvoisin 1270 in Gisors, Eure, Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Guy VII de Mauvoisin, Seigneur de Mello 40 und seine Mutter Isabeau De Mello 31. Er hat 1303 in Crécy-en-Ponthieu, Somme, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich Laure de Ponthieu geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb nach 31. Januar 1327.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Guy VIII de Mauvoisin è nato il nel 1270 nel Gisors, Eure, Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, Guy VII de Mauvoisin, Seigneur de Mello, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Isabeau De Mello, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Laure de Ponthieu nel 1303, nel Crécy-en-Ponthieu, Somme, Hauts-de-France, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì dopo il 31 gennaio 1327.

ja.lifeSummary: Guy VIII de Mauvoisinが1270年にフランスノーマンディエウアギソルズで生まれた時，父Guy VII de Mauvoisin, Seigneur de Melloは40歳，母Isabeau De Melloは31歳であった。1303年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスソンメクルeシ-エン-プオンスイエウでLaure de Ponthieuと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼は1327年1月31日以後に死去した。

ko.Nantes, Loire-Atlantique, Pays de la Loi: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 로이레-앳랜티크 난츠
ko.lifeSummary: Guy VIII de Mauvoisin(이)가 1270년 프랑스 노먼디 우르 지소르스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Guy VII de Mauvoisin, Seigneur de Mello(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabeau De Mello(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1303년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 솜 크e시--폰스이외에서 Laure de Ponthieu(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1327년 1월 31일 이후 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Guy VIII de Mauvoisin nasceu em 1270, em Gisors, Eure, Normandie, França, seu pai, Guy VII de Mauvoisin, Seigneur de Mello, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Isabeau De Mello, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Laure de Ponthieu em 1303, em Crécy-en-Ponthieu, Somme, Hauts-de-France, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ele faleceu após 31 de janeiro de 1327.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Guy VIII de Mauvoisin родился в 1270 г. в местности гисорс, эур, норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Guy VII de Mauvoisin, Seigneur de Mello было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabeau De Mello, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Laure de Ponthieu в 1303 г. в местности крeси-ен-понтиеу, сомм, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он умер после 31 январь 1327 г.
